items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Mental Health Report
Discussion of Year End Assessment Results for the 2023-2024 School Year
Update on the Process for Appointing a New Trustee for Area III
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the September 11 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of Addendum to Garfield Community School's 2024-25 Measure U Application
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and After School Music Academy, LLC for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Air Education Inc. for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Amendment No. 1 to the Agreement between College Advising Prep (CAP) and the Redwood School District for Increased Tutoring Services for the 2023-24 School Year
Approval of Joint Use Renewal Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Building Kidz Family LLC at the Hawes Community School Site
Approval to Purchase a Web-Based CUPCCAA Management Service with PQBids
Adoption of Resolution No. 6, Approval of Education Code and Title V Options for Teaching Assignments for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of 2023-24 Unaudited Actuals Financial Statement
Adoption of Resolution No. 7, Resolution to Adopt the Gann Limit
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - August 2024
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting
